description: Learned source selection policy vs baselines
core_question: Can system learn reusable transfer policy that matches/exceeds Code-First heuristic?

mean_tg.description: Learned mean TG within 0.5pp of Code-First

positive_rate.description: Learned positive rate within 5% of Code-First

mean_regret.description: Learned regret strictly better than Code-First

worst_pair_floor.description: Learned worst pair not worse than Code-First by >1pp

holdout_validation.description: Must hold on unseen target instances

oracle_definition.description: Best possible source for each target

circuit_breakers_IMMEDIATE.CB2: Learned regret NOT better than Code-First
circuit_breakers_IMMEDIATE.CB3: Learned positive rate < Random + 1pp for 2 consecutive rounds

proceed_to_full_l6.action: Execute Full L6 with expanded targets

fallback_to_l5_standalone.trigger: Any circuit breaker fired OR Pilot fails success criteria
